context: Tests whether the agent implements the full 4-step Decision workflow with all required fields, the correct sourceType pattern for COUNT METRIC, the correct executionLimitType, and includes every inputField in every rule's inputValues.

checklist.name: All four required Decision fields
checklist.description: Step 1 POST body includes activeFrom, activeUntil, hitType: 'SINGLE', and executeOnce: false

checklist.name: Step 1 POST enabled false, rules empty
checklist.description: Step 1 POST body sets enabled: false and rules: []

checklist.name: COUNT input is BUSINESSOBJECT sourceType
checklist.description: The count input field uses sourceType 'BUSINESSOBJECT' with sourceId set to the businessObjectId argument (correct for COUNT metrics)

checklist.name: Dimension input is DIMENSION sourceType
checklist.description: The user-id input field uses sourceType 'DIMENSION' with dataType 'TEXT'

checklist.name: actionType (not type)
checklist.description: The action object uses the property name 'actionType' (not 'type') with value 'APPCONTEXT_SET_USER_METADATA'

checklist.name: outputFields uses variable + name
checklist.description: outputFields entry uses the property names 'variable' and 'name' (not 'type')

checklist.name: All four steps executed
checklist.description: Code performs four sequential calls: POST → response read → PUT with rules → PUT with enabled: true (in that order)

checklist.name: Reads auto-generated IDs from POST response
checklist.description: Between Step 1 and Step 3, code parses the POST response and extracts IDs from inputFields, outputFields, and actions

checklist.name: Rule references count input ID
checklist.description: Step 3 rule.conditionGroups[0].conditions[0].inputFieldId references the count input field's auto-generated id from the POST response

checklist.name: inputValues covers every input field
checklist.description: Step 3 rule.inputValues has an entry for BOTH the count input field AND the user id input field (the user id entry uses operation 'ANY')

checklist.name: Final PUT enables
checklist.description: Step 4 PUT body sets enabled: true and returns the final response
